title: TackBird — Neighborhood Board
subtitle: Your neighborhood bulletin board
description:
TackBird connects Helsinki residents with their neighborhood. Ask for help, offer services, share free items, borrow things, and discover local events — all in one app.

Features:
• Posts: ask for help, offer services, share free items, grab deals, or lend
• Events: community events and City of Helsinki events
• Map: browse posts, events, and places on an interactive map
• Messages: chat safely with your neighbors
• Places: discover restaurants, cafés, libraries, and local services nearby
• Profiles: build trust with reviews and achievement badges

TackBird is free to use. Pro subscription unlocks extra features like reduced rental fees and advertising options.
promotional_text: Find your neighbors and local services — all from one app.
whats_new: First release! Posts, events, map, messages, and places.
